Name: ClaudeDeck
Author: Christopher Gulliver
Description: Turn your Stream Deck into a live control surface for Claude Code — color-coded session dashboard, virtual pages, scriptable monitor loops, and one-press jump-to-session.

Actions.Name: Session Tile
Actions.Tooltip: Auto-fills with a live Claude Code session. Green=working, yellow=needs you, grey=idle, red=error. Press to jump to its iTerm pane.

Actions.Name: Page Cycler
Actions.Tooltip: Cycle between virtual dashboard pages. Set one to Next (top-right) and one to Prev (bottom-right). Border glows with your most urgent session.

Actions.Name: Attention Jump
Actions.Tooltip: Pulses when any session needs input or errored. Press to jump straight to whoever needs you. Great for the right-middle key.

Actions.Name: Monitor Loop
Actions.Tooltip: Run any command on a timer (e.g. check Slack every 10 min). Output drives the tile color and caption. Press to run now.
